slots.notes:
Navbar logo, flat in-line svg, 32x32 bounding box, vertically centered. The svg appears at Lg and higher screen sizes.
Logo is defined by two major stroke paths (an 'A-' shape and a rectangular element) on a dark background. It should be rendered as a clean, modern brand mark.

Fullscreen autoplaying muted looping hero background video, absolute inset-0 object-cover behind the HX2/CTA stack. A modern office/space looking footage of an air port with people, planes, baggage, and movement.

Case Study card background image (dark gradient overlay). The dashboard analytics image supplied in the repo should be used. Image cropped 16:9 with even dark tint on the bottom half. The screenshot image from an in-depth production dashboard is running in the background. This image can be re-used from other sections that show a darker version of the same dashboard.
